expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: canonical top-layer grouping without collapsing scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly asserts both parts of the focus and ties them to phase4b-contract evidence: it cites Phase 4b purpose “Group the Phase 4a draft into the canonical top-layer taxonomy…” and also cites anti-compression constraints such as “without merging away scenario granularity” and “grouping and refactor may not silently shrink coverage.”

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4b
expectations.evidence: result.md section “Phase model alignment” states Phase 4b is the dedicated phase for canonical top-layer grouping and references skill_snapshot/SKILL.md and skill_snapshot/reference.md: “Phase 4b: Entry: scripts/phase4b.sh… Work: spawn the canonical top-layer grouper… Output: phase4b_spawn_manifest.json… post requires drafts/qa_plan_phase4b_r<round>.md and validates coverage preservation… canonical layering.” execution_notes.md also frames the validation as “phase4b layering contract check.”
